summary: Codebase Pack 1 - Customer Portal & Service Flow Alignment: Complete testing successful. All features verified working - Customer Portal Layout with grouped navigation, Dashboard homepage with banner carousel and referral points banner, Stats cards with counts, Action cards, Customer Orders/Quotes/Invoices pages with filters, Addresses page with country dropdown and phone prefix integration, Creative Service Detail with payment choice options (pay_now vs quote_first) and save address checkbox.

categories_tested.Customer Addresses API: 4 tests - list, create with country code support
categories_tested.Address Country Support (NEW): 2 tests - Kenya and Uganda country codes with phone prefixes

frontend_ui_tests.customer_portal_layout: PASS - Sidebar with grouped navigation (Orders & Sales, Services, Account, Rewards)
frontend_ui_tests.sidebar_navigation: PASS - All 9 nav items found: Dashboard, Orders, Quotes, Invoices, Designs, Maintenance, Addresses, Referrals, Points

dashboard_home.banner_carousel: PASS - Displays 'New Season Collection' with navigation dots
dashboard_home.referral_points_banner: PASS - Shows referral code (KONEKT-2A69FB) and points balance (100)
dashboard_home.stat_cards: PASS - All 4 found: Active Orders, Open Quotes, Pending Invoices, Points Balance
dashboard_home.action_cards: PASS - All 6 found: Start Design Project, Book Maintenance Service, Pay Outstanding Invoice, Track My Orders, Review My Quotes, Refer & Earn Points

frontend_ui_tests.customer_orders_page: PASS - Loads with filters (All/Active/Completed/Cancelled), shows empty state
frontend_ui_tests.customer_quotes_page: PASS - Loads with empty state and 'Explore services' CTA
frontend_ui_tests.customer_invoices_page: PASS - Loads with empty state and 'Browse services' CTA

addresses_page.form_elements: PASS - All elements found: Label, Full name, Company, Country dropdown, City, Address line 1, Phone prefix, Phone number, Save button
addresses_page.country_phone_prefix_integration: PASS - Selecting Kenya changes prefix to +254, Uganda to +256
addresses_page.existing_address: PASS - Shows 'Test Office' at '123 Test Street, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania' with Default badge

creative_service_detail_page.phone_prefix: PASS - Shows +255 for Tanzania, +254 for Kenya
creative_service_detail_page.payment_choice_options: PASS - Both 'Pay now' and 'Request quote first' options present
creative_service_detail_page.save_address_checkbox: PASS - Checkbox present and checked by default

features_verified: ReferralPointsBanner displays referral code and points balance ✓
Dashboard stats cards (orders, quotes, invoices, points) ✓
Dashboard action cards navigate to correct pages ✓
AddressesPage with country dropdown and phone prefix ✓
Country dropdown changes phone prefix automatically ✓
API /api/customer/referrals/overview returns referral code and points ✓
API /api/customer/addresses CRUD works with country/phone prefix ✓
seed_data_creation: Test address 'Test Office' exists from previous iteration at '123 Test Street, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Codebase Pack 1 fully verified. All customer portal pages working correctly: Dashboard, Orders, Quotes, Invoices, Addresses, Referrals, Points. Country dropdown with phone prefix integration verified in both AddressesPage and CreativeServiceDetailPage. Payment choice options (pay_now/quote_first) verified in creative service order form. 22 backend API tests passing.
